rationale: Educ. Code §21.049 governs alternative educator preparation programs and is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemptions. No conflict exists.
quote: To provide a continuing additional source of qualified educators, the board shall propose rules providing that educator certification programs may be provided by an institution of higher education or another entity.
_note: The cited rule concerns educator certification, not property tax exemptions; no overlap with proposed change.
